rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (6/10) and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: rare commercial IDE experience and demonstrated tooling passion as strengths, weighed against missing Kotlin/Spring and non-recent Java experience. The variant never references location, India, nationality, or any geographic signal; the differences are reworded phrasings of the same substantive points (e.g., 'past several years' vs '5+ years'), well within run-to-run noise. Nothing keys off the Berlin-to-India change.
